name: 73450 Country Club Dr
comment:
[Job Note]: Rhonda Laura from Suncrest Country Club called Dan Saunders to inquire about window cleaning services for her double wide home. Dan confirmed they offer full-time professional window and solar panel cleaning services. After Rhonda described her home and the number of windows and doors, Dan estimated the service would cost between $170 and $195 including vacuuming both inside and out. Rhonda agreed to the price and requested the earliest service availability, which Dan mentioned could be the following day. They agreed to communicate further details via text, including scheduling and gate access code.

[Comment]: tip 15.00
